title: Count Of Integers
description: Count integers in the inclusive decimal-string range whose digit sum lies in [min_sum,max_sum], modulo 1e9+7. Inputs use Python lists and integers; unless explicitly stated, callers need not preserve mutable inputs.
input_contract: Parameters in order: num1: str, num2: str, min_sum: int, max_sum: int. 1 <= integer(num1) <= integer(num2) < 10^23; no leading zeros; 1 <= min_sum <= max_sum <= 400; answer modulo 1000000007.
output_contract: Return integer using exact comparison. Python integer arithmetic has no 32-bit overflow; array/query order is significant.
